page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core memory-to-vCPU ratio. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-core CPU performance, placing in the top 25% for stress-ng single-core tests. Multi-core CPU performance, software compilation, and cryptography operations fall within the average range. However, memory performance is mixed; while cached small-block read bandwidth is average, large-block uncached read and write bandwidth, along with overall PassMark memory and database operation scores, fall into the bottom 25%.

This instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy workloads that do not demand high-speed local storage or high network throughput. The primary tradeoffs include the lack of local NVMe storage and weak uncached memory bandwidth. It is best suited for memory-intensive applications such as in-memory caching, Redis deployments, web serving, and lightweight data processing tasks that fit entirely within the 64.0 GB memory footprint.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance lacks local storage and GPUs, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmarks show strong single-core CPU performance, though large-block uncached memory bandwidth and database operations fall into the lower tier. The instance offers a cost-efficient profile for memory-heavy workloads that do not require local NVMe storage. It is suitable for Redis caching, static web serving, and general-purpose memory-intensive tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 8 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, designed for memory-intensive workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.2xlarge features 8 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: An x86 memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio for memory-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 vCPUs at 2.55 GHz
64.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core
Strong single-core CPU performance in benchmarks
No local storage and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Suited for Redis caching, web serving, and in-memory tasks
